attrs.gen.dlab.description: If 'attrs.gen.days' is set to true, set the label of the days.

attrs.gen.hlab.description: If 'attrs.gen.hours' is set to true, set the label of the hours.

attrs.gen.message.value.description: If 'attrs.gen.afterexp' is set to '2', set the message to show.

attrs.gen.message.variable.description: The property indicating that the message is computed, with its value determined by a Yeeflow Calculation expression, which overrides the 'attrs.gen.message.value' attribute.

attrs.gen.mlab.description: If 'attrs.gen.minutes' is set to true, set the label of the minutes.

attrs.gen.slab.description: If 'attrs.gen.seconds' is set to true, set the label of the seconds.

attrs.gen.url.opentype.description: If 'attrs.gen.afterexp' is set to '1', set whether to open the link in a new window.

attrs.gen.url.value.description: If 'attrs.gen.afterexp' is set to '1', set the URL to redirect to.

attrs.gen.url.variable.description: If attrs.gen.afterexp is set to '1', Yeeflow Calculation expression to get the URL to redirect to.

attrs.set.date.value.description: The due date set for initiating a countdown if the attribute 'attrs.set.type' has a value of '1'.

attrs.set.date.variable.description: The property indicating that the due date is computed, with its value determined by a Yeeflow Calculation expression, which overrides the 'attrs.set.date.value' attribute.

attrs.set.height.description: If 'attrs.set.size' is set to '2', set the height of the timer.; supports CSS calc() strings when 'attrs.set.heiu' is 'calc'.

attrs.set.heiu.description: If 'attrs.set.size' is set to '2', set the unit of the height of the timer.

enum.%: Percentage relative to the container height
enum.em: Relative to font size of the element
enum.rem: Relative to font size of the root element
enum.vh: Relative to 1% of the viewport height

attrs.set.size.description: The attribute indicates whether the timer is set to an automatic size '1' or a fixed size '2'.

attrs.set.start-date.value.description: The start time for the timer is set when the attribute `attrs.set.type` has a value of '2'.

attrs.set.start-date.variable.description: The property indicating that the start time is computed, with its value determined by a Yeeflow Calculation expression, which overrides the 'attrs.set.start-date.value' attribute.

attrs.set.type.description: Defines the timer mode: either counting down to a target time or counting up from a start point.

enum.1: Due date, countdown to a specific date and time
enum.2: Endless timer, stopwatch starting from a specific date and time

attrs.set.width.description: If 'attrs.set.size' is set to '2', set the width of the timer; supports CSS calc() strings when 'attrs.set.widthu' is 'calc'.

attrs.set.widthu.description: If 'attrs.set.size' is set to '2', set the unit of the width of the timer.

enum.%: Percentage relative to the container width
enum.em: Relative to font size of the element
enum.rem: Relative to font size of the root element
enum.vw: Relative to 1% of the viewport width
